data.title: An InventHelp 123Invent Client Develops Industrial Printer for HVAC Technicians (MHO-733)
data.description: On April 1, 2026, in Pittsburgh, it was highlighted that achieving precision in duct cutting within the HVAC sector is a task that demands extensive experience, precise measurements, and constant oversight from proficient technicians. Novice apprentices and installers frequently expend excessive time and resources in attempts to accurately cut ducts. This underscores the significance of acquiring the necessary skills within the industry.

data.title: Benjamin Moore Celebrates Contractor Appreciation Month as Program Marks Five-Year Milestone
data.description: Montvale, New Jersey—Benjamin Moore, a leading brand in premium paint and coatings with over 140 years of experience in color innovation, has announced the commencement of its fifth-annual Contractor Appreciation Month. This event stands as the paint industry's key tribute to residential and commercial painting experts throughout North America. This year's celebration represents the fifth year of recognizing the talented professionals who rely on Benjamin Moore paints to revamp living and working environments.

data.title: FDA approves Lilly's Foundayo™ (orforglipron), the only GLP-1 pill for weight loss that can be taken any time of day without food or water restrictions
data.description: In a recent clinical trial, adults using Foundayo experienced an average weight loss of 27 pounds when taking the highest dosage. This medication, Lilly's second FDA-approved treatment for obesity, will soon be accessible through LillyDirect® with complimentary home delivery. The cost starts at $25 per month with commercial insurance coverage and $149 for...
TOYOTA MOTOR NORTH AMERICA SOLD 115,422 ELECTRIFIED VEHICLES IN THE U.S. IN MARCH 2026.

data.title: Aramis Group announces alterations in management structure, with 3 new executives joining the team.
data.description: Authorities reported that a total of 500 people were evacuated from their homes due to a massive wildfire in the area. The fire, which has already scorched 10,000 acres of land, is only 20% contained so far. Three firefighters sustained injuries while battling the blaze, but no civilian casualties have been reported. Several roads have been closed in the affected area, and air quality advisories have been issued due to heavy smoke. The cause of the wildfire is still under investigation, and officials are urging residents to stay vigilant and follow evacuation orders as necessary.
ELI LILLY'S WEIGHT LOSS PILL, FOUNDAYO, RECEIVES APPROVAL IN THE US.

data.title: Crowe welcomes and celebrates 25 new partners and principals
data.description: Crowe LLP, a prominent public accounting and consulting firm based in Chicago, announced on April 1, 2026, the successful election of 25 new partners and principals to the firm. The new partner class for Fiscal Year 2027 is now officially inducted into the partnership, marking a significant achievement for these individuals. This expansion in leadership brings valuable expertise and experience to the firm, further solidifying its position in the industry.

data.title: Edward Jones Earns Spot on 2026 Fortune® 100 Best Companies to Work For®
data.description: Edward Jones has been recognized as the 21st best workplace in the 2026 Fortune list, based on feedback from 55,000 employees. This acknowledgment highlights the company's commitment to fostering a supportive work environment that promotes growth, well-being, and purposeful impact. The recognition underscores Edward Jones' dedication to cultivating a positive workplace culture.

data.title: NVIDIA's Blackwell Ultra GPUs dominate MLPerf benchmarks, achieving 2.7x faster DeepSeek-R1 processing at 2.5M tokens/s across 288 GPUs.
data.description: The latest Blackwell Ultra GPUs from NVIDIA have achieved record-breaking MLPerf Inference results, showcasing a 2.7x improvement in DeepSeek-R1 processing speed. These GPUs were able to process an impressive 2.5 million tokens per second utilizing 288 GPUs, demonstrating significant advancements in AI performance.

data.title: Newmark Arranges $525 Million Refinancing for The Artise on Behalf of Schnitzer West and The Baupost Group
data.description: In Bellevue, Washington, on March 31, 2026, it was reported that Newmark successfully secured a $525 million refinancing deal for The Artise. This newly constructed, top-tier office building stands 25 stories high in downtown Bellevue and boasts Class A+ status. With a remarkable 99% occupancy rate, the tower has garnered substantial interest. The financing arrangement signifies Newmark's proficiency in managing large-scale capital projects, solidifying its position as a trusted player in the industry.
MSC: From 1st of May 2026 until further notice, EFS will be applicable to all cargo on the trades from Asia to the USA and Canada.

data.title: CRAFT Restaurant & Beer Market Opens First U.S location in Dallas on April 1, 2026
data.description: A popular restaurant from North America has recently launched its inaugural outlet in Dallas's Preston Center. CRAFT Restaurant & Beer Market is the name of this establishment, and it boasts a massive rooftop patio that can accommodate up to 500 guests. The restaurant offers a high-energy atmosphere and is located in the heart of the city. This exciting new development is sure to attract food and drink enthusiasts from all over the region.

data.title: Franklin Templeton acquiring a CoinFund spinoff to expand its crypto offerings and establish Franklin Crypto. #Investment #Cryptocurrency
data.description: Franklin Templeton, a worldwide asset manager, is in the process of acquiring a spinoff of CoinFund to expand its presence in the cryptocurrency sector. This move will allow Franklin Templeton to establish Franklin Crypto, its dedicated division for dealing with digital assets. The acquisition marks a strategic initiative for Franklin Templeton to venture into the growing field of cryptocurrency.

data.title: WARNER MUSIC GROUP AGREES TO ACQUIRE REVELATOR, STATE-OF-THE-ART INDEPENDENT MUSIC PLATFORM
data.description: Warner Music Group (NASDAQ: WMG) has recently announced a significant step in expanding its distribution and label services by finalizing a deal to purchase Revelator, a cutting-edge B2B music platform catering to the global independent industry. This acquisition marks a strategic move in WMG's growth plans, showcasing its commitment to enhancing its service offerings. This new development signifies a key milestone in WMG's expansion efforts and is expected to bring substantial value to both companies involved.

data.title: There's Nothing More American Than Muscle: Dodge Debuts Durango GT America250 Edition at 2026 New York International Auto Show
data.description: Auburn Hills, Michigan - Today, Dodge unveiled the 2026 Durango GT America250 (A250) edition at the 2026 New York International Auto Show press event. This special edition commemorates America's 250th anniversary. The Durango GT America250 is the initial production model, showcasing the country's milestone.
